content_blocks.text:
धातुर्मूलं जीवमित्याहुरार्या मेषादीनामोजयुग्मे तथैव ।
वर्णाद्धातुमृत्तिकान्तस्तृणान्तं वृक्षान्मूलं जीवकूटः सजीवः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
धातुर्मूलं जीवमित्याहुरार्या मेषादीनामोजयुग्मे तथैव ।
वर्णाद्धातुमृत्तिकान्तस्तृणान्तं वृक्षान्मूलं जीवकूटः सजीवः ॥
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs into mineral, vegetable, and animal categories, and odd/even.

content_blocks.text:
Wise men say in respect of Mesha and
other signs taken in order, that they are mineral, vege-
table and animal, as also odd and even signs. Mineral
comprises things of that class varying from gold to clay.
Vegetable includes all plants from a tree down to a
grass and the animal includes the whole body of living
beings.

verse_data.translation:
Wise men say in respect of Mesha and
other signs taken in order, that they are mineral, vege-
table and animal, as also odd and even signs. Mineral
comprises things of that class varying from gold to clay.
Vegetable includes all plants from a tree down to a
grass and the animal includes the whole body of living
beings.
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs into mineral, vegetable, and animal categories, and odd/even.

content_blocks.text:
मीनालिवृषभा विप्राश्चापाजहरयो नृपाः ।
कुंभयुग्मतुला वैश्याः शूद्राः स्त्रीमृगकर्कटाः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मीनालिवृषभा विप्राश्चापाजहरयो नृपाः ।
कुंभयुग्मतुला वैश्याः शूद्राः स्त्रीमृगकर्कटाः ॥
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs into castes (Brahmin, Kshatriya, Vaishya, Shudra).

content_blocks.text:
Meena, Vrischika and Vrishabha are
Brahmins. Dhanus, Mesha and Simha are Kshatriyas ;
Kumbha, Mithuna and Thula are Vaisyas; and Kanya,
Makara and Kataka are Sudras.

verse_data.translation:
Meena, Vrischika and Vrishabha are
Brahmins. Dhanus, Mesha and Simha are Kshatriyas ;
Kumbha, Mithuna and Thula are Vaisyas; and Kanya,
Makara and Kataka are Sudras.
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs into castes (Brahmin, Kshatriya, Vaishya, Shudra).

content_blocks.text:
The sign Vrishabha is considered as Sudra (शुर) and Kataka
Brahmin. This seems to be the correct view. cf. प्रपञ्चसार, चतुर्थ
पटल-Sloka 41.

स्युः कर्कटो वृश्चिकमीनराशी विप्रा नृपाः सिंहकधन्वभेषाः ।
तुला सकुंभा मिथुनं च वैश्याः कन्या वृषोऽयो मकरच शूद्राः ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
स्युः कर्कटो वृश्चिकमीनराशी विप्रा नृपाः सिंहकधन्वभेषाः ।
तुला सकुंभा मिथुनं च वैश्याः कन्या वृषोऽयो मकरच शूद्राः ॥
verse_data.topic: Reiteration of caste classification of signs.

content_blocks.text:
महानिशान्धाः क्रियगोमृगेशा मध्यन्दिने कर्कटयुग्मकन्याः ।
पूर्वाह्नकाले बधिरौ तुलाली धन्वी मृगाख्यश्च तथा पराद्धे ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
महानिशान्धाः क्रियगोमृगेशा मध्यन्दिने कर्कटयुग्मकन्याः ।
पूर्वाह्नकाले बधिरौ तुलाली धन्वी मृगाख्यश्च तथा पराद्धे ॥
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs based on blindness at different times of the day.

content_blocks.text:
Mesha, Vrishabha and Simha are blind
at the dead of night. Kataka, Mithuna and Kanya are
blind at midday. Thula and Vrischika ara deaf in the
forenoon. Dhanus and Makara are so in the afternoon.

verse_data.translation:
Mesha, Vrishabha and Simha are blind
at the dead of night. Kataka, Mithuna and Kanya are
blind at midday. Thula and Vrischika ara deaf in the
forenoon. Dhanus and Makara are so in the afternoon.
verse_data.topic: Classification of signs based on blindness at different times of the day.

content_blocks.text:
मृगाननश्चापधरश्चपङ्ग सन्धिद्वये नाशकरौ भवेताम्।
स्वादृश्चसन्धिः कटकालिमीनमान्तं प्रगण्डान्तमिति प्रसिद्धम् ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
मृगाननश्चापधरश्चपङ्ग सन्धिद्वये नाशकरौ भवेताम्।
स्वादृश्चसन्धिः कटकालिमीनमान्तं प्रगण्डान्तमिति प्रसिद्धम् ॥
verse_data.topic: Further details on afflictions related to sign junctions.

content_blocks.text: The junctions of signs like Mriganana (Mesha), Dhanu (Sagittarius) and Makara (Capricorn) are destructive. The junctions of Kataka, Meena and the end of the signs are also considered destructive.

verse_data.translation: The junctions of signs like Mriganana (Mesha), Dhanu (Sagittarius) and Makara (Capricorn) are destructive. The junctions of Kataka, Meena and the end of the signs are also considered destructive.
verse_data.topic: Further details on afflictions related to sign junctions.

raw_text:
19
जातकपारिजाते
Adh I
धातुर्मूलं जीवमित्याहुरार्या मेषादीनामोजयुग्मे तथैव ।
वर्णाद्धातुमृत्तिकान्तस्तृणान्तं वृक्षान्मूलं जीवकूटः सजीवः ॥ १९ ॥
Sloka. 19. Wise men say in respect of Mesha and
other signs taken in order, that they are mineral, vege-
table and animal, as also odd and even signs. Mineral
comprises things of that class varying from gold to clay.
Vegetable includes all plants from a tree down to a
grass and the animal includes the whole body of living
beings.
मीनालिवृषभा विप्राश्चापाजहरयो नृपाः ।
कुंभयुग्मतुला वैश्याः शूद्राः स्त्रीमृगकर्कटाः ॥२० ॥
Sloka. 21. Meena, Vrischika and Vrishabha are
Brahmins. Dhanus, Mesha and Simha are Kshatriyas ;
Kumbha, Mithuna and Thula are Vaisyas; and Kanya,
Makara and Kataka are Sudras.
NOTES,
The sign Vrishabha is considered as Sudra (शुर) and Kataka
Brahmin. This seems to be the correct view. cf. प्रपञ्चसार, चतुर्थ
पटल-Sloka 41.
स्युः कर्कटो वृश्चिकमीनराशी विप्रा नृपाः सिंहकधन्वभेषाः ।
तुला सकुंभा मिथुनं च वैश्याः कन्या वृषोऽयो मकरच शूद्राः ॥
महानिशान्धाः क्रियगोमृगेशा मध्यन्दिने कर्कटयुग्मकन्याः ।
पूर्वाह्नकाले बधिरौ तुलाली धन्वी मृगाख्यश्च तथा पराद्धे ॥ २१ ॥
Sloka. 21. Mesha, Vrishabha and Simha are blind
at the dead of night. Kataka, Mithuna and Kanya are
blind at midday. Thula and Vrischika ara deaf in the
forenoon. Dhanus and Makara are so in the afternoon.
मृगाननश्चापधरश्चपङ्ग सन्धिद्वये नाशकरौ भवेताम्।
स्वादृश्चसन्धिः कटकालिमीनमान्तं प्रगण्डान्तमिति प्रसिद्धम् ॥२२॥
